title: meleemajors.gg tournaments API
description: Public listing of upcoming Super Smash Bros. Melee majors, as served from https://meleemajors.gg/api/v1/tournaments.json. Regenerated on every site build.

lastUpdated.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when this payload was generated. Updates on every site build, not only when tournament data changes.

tournaments.description: All tracked tournaments, ordered chronologically by start date (soonest first).

name.description: Human-readable tournament name as displayed on the site (e.g. "Riptide 2026", "Pat's House 5").

startggTournamentName.description: Internal slug-like identifier derived from the tournament's start.gg URL. Stable across builds and safe to use as a key.

startTimestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for when the tournament begins (typically the first day's check-in or first match). UTC-offset is the event's local offset.

endTimestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for when the tournament ends, as reported by start.gg. Reflected verbatim without any end-of-day rounding.

dateString.description: Pre-formatted human-readable date range intended for display (e.g. "April 10 - April 12"). Format is not machine-parseable; use startTimestamp for programmatic date handling.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name for the tournament venue. Pair with startTimestamp to render local times.

top8StartTime.description: Announced start time of Top 8, in the organizer's preferred format. Free-form; null if not yet scheduled.

entrants.description: Total registered entrants in the main singles bracket. null if registration has not opened or the count is otherwise unknown.

players.description: Fixed-length list of the top 8 seeded/notable entrants, ordered by seed. Slots that have not yet been announced are null.

items.description: Player tag, or null if the slot is unannounced.

cityAndState.description: Short locality string for display (city + state/region). Free-form; format varies by country.

fullAddress.description: Full postal address of the venue, as provided by the organizer. Free-form.
examples: Price Center, La Jolla, CA 92093, USA

mapsLink.description: Google Maps search URL for the venue address. Derived from fullAddress.

startggUrl.description: Canonical start.gg URL for the main Melee singles event page.

startggDetailsUrl.description: start.gg URL for the tournament's overview /details page, which lists all events and general info. Prefer this over startggUrl for general-purpose linking.

streamUrl.description: Primary livestream URL (typically Twitch or YouTube). null if no stream has been announced.

scheduleUrl.description: URL to the published event schedule. null if unavailable.

imageUrl.description: Absolute URL to the tournament's promotional banner image (wide aspect), self-hosted on meleemajors.gg.

thumbnailUrl.description: Absolute URL to the tournament's square thumbnail/profile image (typically used as an icon), self-hosted on meleemajors.gg. null if start.gg does not expose a distinct profile image for this tournament.
